name: 7'x10' Woven Floral Distressed Rug Blue - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Indoor Low Pile Rectangle Area Rug
description: Add some timeless flair to your flooring with this Woven Floral Distressed Rug from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This rectangular area rug is designed with a floral pattern in blue, beige, and other earthy shades with a distressed finish, and it's framed by a complementary border to add old-world charm to your space. With 100% cotton backing and a low pile height, the rug is easy to spot or wipe clean and suitable for high-traffic areas like your den or entryway.
